import { Component } from '@angular/core'; @Component({ selector: 'app-sidebar', templateUrl: './sidebar.component.html' }) export class SidebarComponent { readonly links = [ { label: 'Dashboard', route: '/dashboard' }, { label: 'Upload Resume', route: '/resume/upload' }, { label: 'Create Resume', route: '/resume-builder/templates' }, { label: 'Pricing', route: '/pricing' } ]; }
